types:type.name: excel
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type excel = {| Sheet2?: Array<{| "Product Name": String, "Product Sub-Category": String, "Product Category": String, "Customer Segment": String, "Customer Name": String |}> |}

types:type.name: txt
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type txt = {| ProductName: String, ProductSubCategory: String, ProductCategory: String, CustomerSegment: String, CustomerName: String |} {"example": "{\\\"ProductName\\\":\\\"SANFORD Liquid Accent\u2122 Tank-Style Highlighters\\\",\\\"ProductSubCategory\\\":\\\"Pens & Art Supplies\\\",\\\"ProductCategory\\\":\\\"Office Supplies\\\",\\\"CustomerSegment\\\":\\\"Corporate\\\",\\\"CustomerName\\\":\\\"Bonnie Potter\\\"}"}
